articles.title: Massive Discounts on Laptops This Prime Day
articles.description: Prime Day offers up to $970 off MacBooks and Windows PCs. Grab these deals before they end.
articles.impact: Consumers can save significantly on laptops.

articles.title: Windows 10 Extended Support Extended by Microsoft
articles.description: Microsoft extends Windows 10 update program by another year. A quarter of PCs still use this OS.
key_points: Quarter of PCs still use it
articles.impact: Users benefit from continued support and updates.

articles.title: Prime Day Deals: 120+ Discounts Found
articles.description: Amazon's Prime Day features over 120 deals from brands like Apple and Lego. Don't miss out on these savings.
articles.impact: Shoppers can save big on popular products.

articles.title: Microsoft Raises Xbox Prices Amid Component Costs
articles.description: Microsoft announces price hikes for Xbox consoles due to rising component costs. Consumers can expect higher prices starting August 1.
articles.impact: Gamers will face higher console prices.

articles.title: YouTube Shorts Introduces New Features
articles.description: YouTube Shorts adds Clear Screen mode and 2x playback speed. Dislike button removed for a cleaner experience.

articles.title: AI Chief Aims to Slash AI Power Costs
articles.description: Databricks' former AI chief proposes a system to reduce AI's power consumption by 1,000 times. Aiming for a breakthrough in efficiency.
articles.impact: Potentially transformative for AI energy use.

articles.title: Star Fox Remake Sparks Player Creativity
articles.description: Star Fox remake for Switch 2 encourages players to use VTuber avatars. The game offers a modern twist on a classic.
articles.impact: Players engage creatively with the game.

articles.title: Notion to Shut Down AI Email Client
articles.description: Notion announces the closure of its AI-powered email client, Notion Mail, effective this fall. Users will need to transition to alternatives.
articles.impact: Users must find new email solutions.

articles.title: Bungie Lays Off Destiny 2 Development Team
articles.description: Bungie announces layoffs affecting most of the Destiny 2 development team. The company faces challenges in the gaming market.
key_points: Most of Destiny 2 team laid off

articles.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Leaks Reveal Key Details
articles.description: Leaks about the Galaxy Z Fold 8 reveal pre-order perks and release date. Initial impressions suggest limited upgrades.
articles.impact: Consumers await more details on the device.

articles.title: Samsung's New Budget Phone Price Increase
articles.description: Samsung's Galaxy A27 launches at $50 more despite downgraded features. New chip but lower camera quality.
articles.impact: Consumers face higher costs for less value.

articles.title: Google Play Offers Games for Just $0.10
articles.description: Google Play's 'Mega Game Sale' discounts popular Android games to only $0.10. Sale runs until July 2.
